title: Crunchy Indian-Style Snack
description: A spicy and crunchy snack inspired by Indian cuisine. Perfect for a quick snack or appetizer.

ingredients.name: chocolate
ingredients.notes: melted and used as a sauce

ingredients.name: roasted cumin seeds
ingredients.notes: toasted in a pan for 1 minute

instructions: Spread the chips on a baking sheet and bake for 5 minutes, or until crispy.
In a pan, heat the roasted cumin seeds over medium heat for 1 minute.
Add the stir-fry sauce and stir for 30 seconds.
Add the crispy onions and stir for another 30 seconds.
Drizzle the melted chocolate over the top and stir until combined.
